narrative:
Malik Tillman is an attacking midfielder for Germany, holding an overall rating of 7.16/10. This places him in the top 4% of attacking midfields at this tournament, with 35% of his rating derived from his World Cup performances. His rating range of 6.8–7.52 reflects the current match sample size.

Tillman has demonstrated strong attacking output at this World Cup, scoring 0.493 goals and providing 0.247 assists per 90 minutes. This World Cup goal rate significantly surpasses his club form of 0.321 goals per 90 minutes over the last two seasons. He also contributes defensively, averaging 1.973 tackles and 1.479 interceptions per 90 minutes.

Having played 365 minutes, Tillman is a vital attacking threat for his national team. Scouts should closely observe if he can maintain his impressive goal and assist numbers, especially compared to his expected goals of 0.224 and expected assists of 0.157 per 90 minutes. His consistent defensive work rate will also be crucial in Germany's remaining matches.
